transcript.clean_text: last chance for the fast men at the UAE tour just one stage after this running up to jabal her feet big climbing day to decide the title but this the last one for the sprinters to show their credentials would the lead out trains hold it together on the highway at the end two intermediate Sprints along the way leaving the Wonder Brothers world and heading indeed inexorably to the Abu Dhabi Breakwater well three Riders went for the Breakaway of course it included zocorato Ed blanket in the black Jersey and Larry warbass taking the first of the intermediate Sprints the trio stayed out there in punishing temperatures around 33 Celsius and in the end the second intermediate Sprint was not contested blanket taking that as well and virtually securing the black jersey with one stage to go help yourself said zakarato Larry wobas almost a passenger as part of proceedings here four bus was to be Last Man Standing from the Breakaway when it was finally tagged on the approach to home well with so much Sprint Talent here and indeed all unique winners day by day it was always going to be a difficult Choice kenned with a strong lead out train but Disturbed over the last couple of days as had Mark cavanish been for Astana Kazakhstan and Sam Bennett has not won a stage to this point either would they manage to string it together on this day my nerve's just starting to fray a little bit the last two kilometers real pinch points and indeed some rather technical approach roads as well getting yourself into position was always going to be a difficult task especially at the very last the swooping curves everno Paul himself was up towards the front believing that was the safest place to be and in so doing offered up Tim Malia a little bit of respite power in the legs you might say we weren't going to see Mark cavanish sadly rear puncture very very late on did for his Ambitions and caliburon was boxed and harried yet again so many were so how would it unwind calling for Pace Dylan Groner vegan who'd won on Friday he wanted room to play so did Sam Bennett there wasn't much around look at the green jersey though on the shoulders of timelya it opened up on the barrier side left hand he threw down and indeed The Gauntlet to everybody else Catch Me If You Can said Malia and delivered beautifully he and Sam Bennett with a full back length on the pursuers done out of it Sam Bennett I'm not happy with second place but Tim Malia absolutely Supreme just look at the way it opened up for him they've done a recce had sudo Quick Step and it clearly paid dividends he knew which side of the road to go swooping to Victory his second of the race Malia almost secure in green as well it's second by hand and kept growing up again koi kaviria Klein wellsford staying in red Remco Avenue Paul with one stage to go safe out front you might say well let's see it's tight at the top jabble at her feet awaits ever to hold leads plot by nine seconds Spilled Out by 13 no it's a minute by those we've got a great finale coming a proper hockey stick of a stage short at 153 kilometers but just look what lies at the end of it to decide our winner likely to be ever Nepal but he will be pressured you can bet your life the UA tour beguiles one more stage to go to find our champion

transcript.preview_end: Remco Avenue Paul with one stage to go safe out front you might say well let's see it's tight at the top jabble at her feet awaits ever to hold leads plot by nine seconds Spilled Out by 13 no it's a minute by those we've got a great finale coming a proper hockey stick of a stage short at 153 kilometers but just look what lies at the end of it to decide our winner likely to be ever Nepal but he will be pressured you can bet your life the UA tour beguiles one more stage to go to find our champion
